details.name: qa-startup-identifies-testing:Output identifies TESTING features
details.actual_excerpt:
Purlin QA — Ready
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

This is the QA Agent — it runs through test scenarios, flags
anything that looks off, and confirms the code matches the spec.
Point it at a feature or let it find what's ready to verify.
Spotted a bug? Use /pl-discovery anytime to log it.

  Global
  ──────
  /pl-status                 Check CDD status and action items
  /pl-resume [save|role]     Save or restore session state
  /pl-help                   Re-display this command

details.name: status-skill-structured-summary:Output contains feature counts by lifecycle status
details.expected: Output contains feature counts by lifecycle status
details.actual_excerpt:
I need permission to run the Purlin status script. This script is part of the Purlin framework and will report on feature statuses and action items.

**Please approve running:** `purlin/tools/cdd/status.sh --role Architect`

This will show:
- Feature counts (TODO / TESTING / COMPLETE)
- Your Architect-specific action items
- Any open disputes or spec gaps requiring attention
